title: Upcoming: Community Event with monday dev product manager
excerpt: Join us on Monday, January 16th for an exclusive online community event with monday dev product manager, Ran. Ran will demo the new monday dev product, discuss its capabilities and even answer questions from our communit…

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Join us on Monday, January 16th for an exclusive online community event with monday dev product manager, Ran. Ran will demo the new monday dev product, discuss its capabilities and even answer questions from our community.

Mark your calendars and register now to learn more about how monday dev gives you everything you need to plan, execute, and collaborate to deliver better products all on one platform — from ideation to deployment.

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )

Hope to see you there! Comment with any questions.
